title: poa quinquefida
intro: Poa quinquefida, also known as Five Nerved Bluegrass, is a type of perennial grass native to New Zealand and parts of Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Poa quinquefida is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, dried and used as an herbal powder or tincture for its medicinal purposes.
